reviews.review_description:
VR Schoool - Leonardo da Vinci is a surprisingly polished VR learning experience with graphics that are genuinely good for an educational title. The museum spaces, outdoor area and exhibits are presented with high resolution reference images, so you can really get close to the artwork and inventions and still see plenty of detail.

I really enjoyed the progression from exploration into a more playful learning shooter, complete with a simple point system and collectibles that keep you engaged without feeling childish. The guided journey through Leonardo’s life and work, moving between museums and open environments, is put together in a way that feels both educational and entertaining. The narrator’s voice sounds professional and clear, which makes it easy to follow along. I only tested the English version, but there is also a Spanish option available.

The small quiz at the end is a nice touch to recap what you have learned and makes the app especially suitable for use in schools. Teachers who want to introduce Leonardo da Vinci in a modern and memorable way should definitely take a look at this. Overall, VR Schoool - Leonardo da Vinci is a great mix of art, history and interactive learning inside VR.
